title: acacia celsiana
intro: Acacia celsiana, also known as the bushy acacia, is a small tree or shrub native to Australia, characterized by its thorny branches and bright yellow flowers. The medicinal properties of Acacia celsiana include its ability to soothe digestive issues and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu, due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of consuming Acacia celsiana tea or extracts include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. Acacia celsiana is traditionally prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
